Two minor issues found and fixed:

**`/mnt/data/labs/recipe-finder/src/index.ts`** (line 519) — Silent failure: when `searchRecipeLinks` or `fetchRecipe` threw, the user received a blank results page with no explanation. Fixed by capturing the error and passing it to `HTML_SHELL`, which now renders a visible red error message ("Search failed: ...") instead of silently returning empty results.
